reasoning: Order status shows 'Complete' with item marked as 'Shipped', but customer claims non-delivery. However, VIP exception notes indicate customer has 42 orders ($6,200 lifetime value) with only 2 prior refunds. Company delayed response beyond 30-day policy window (customer contacted at day 32), making this an exception case. SLA requires quick decision - approving maintains VIP relationship per documented recommendation.
